title: Fix camera audio availability detection on mobile live grid
note: Minor mobile frontend bugfix; nurby has audio availability already.

title: Allow GenAI providers to be initialized lazily
note: Frigate now tolerates a GenAI provider that fails on initial load and retries lazily. Check services/perception/vlm.py provider init: does a bad provider key crash the worker at startup, or degrade gracefully?

title: Replace export ffmpeg argument blocklist with a structural allowlist
insight: Blocklist on user ffmpeg export args was bypassable -> arbitrary file r/w + SSRF; switched to allowlist.
nurby_evidence: conversation_clip.py / analyzer.py pass Recording.file_path to ffmpeg via permissive _resolve_path; no arg allowlist. Stream URL had no scheme validation (now fixed, see #23352).
action: Allowlist ffmpeg flags; constrain file paths via shared/paths containment; block private-net SSRF on http stream/snapshot URLs.

title: Generate API docs spec with per-endpoint authentication requirements
note: Nurby already ships OpenAPI; auth-per-endpoint annotation is a nice-to-have.

title: Fix autotracking camera crash from non-finite tracker distance values
insight: PTZ autotracking divided by / normalized a tracker distance that could be NaN/inf -> crash.
nurby_evidence: Object tracker (tracker.py) IS guarded, BUT nurby has ptz_smart_track_* (schemas.py:141-155) whose move math (gain*distance, deadzone, max_speed) was NOT inspected.
action: Audit PTZ smart-track controller for non-finite pan/tilt/zoom deltas; clamp + skip move on non-finite.

title: Fix chat tool calling and prompt breaking
insight: Tool calls were dropped from subsequent messages (model lost context); system prompt fixes.
nurby_evidence: agent/driver.py re-appends tool_use + tool_result blocks each turn, jsonschema-validates args, falls back to {} on bad JSON across all providers. Already robust.

title: Add recording keyframe analysis to camera probe dialog
insight: Probe a camera's recording to surface keyframe interval / smart-codec issues that hurt recording quality.
nurby_evidence: No recording-keyframe diagnostic in camera probe found.
action: Add ffprobe-based keyframe-interval readout to camera diagnostics; warn on long GOP / B-frames.

title: Miscellaneous fixes (CameraConfigUpdateSubscriber ZMQ narrowing)
note: Frigate ZMQ per-camera subscription bug; nurby uses Redis streams + DB poll, not ZMQ.

title: Chapter tweaks (MP4 export chapters)
note: Relates to MP4 export chapters (#23310). Minor.

title: Miscellaneous fixes
note: Opaque grab-bag; revisit if a theme needs it.

title: Update reference config
note: YAML reference config; nurby is DB-driven.

title: Mobile UI/UX improvements
note: Frontend polish; revisit during a UI parity pass.

title: Add snapshot download to History player
note: Does nurby timeline allow downloading a frame snapshot? Check during UI pass.

title: Upgrade ffmpeg to 8 by default
note: Check ffmpeg version baked into nurby ingestion/api images; ffmpeg 8 has decode/hwaccel improvements.

title: Add ability to hide cameras from review UI
insight: Hide a camera from the review/alerts feed independently of hiding from the live dashboard.
nurby_evidence: Camera-wall hide (commit b870614) hides from dashboard; no separate exclude-from-timeline/alerts flag.
action: Add per-camera exclude_from_review flag; still records, drops from timeline/alerts feed + filters.

title: Optimize motion activity endpoint
note: Part of the motion-search/review theme. See initiatives/motion-search-and-review.md

title: Refactor motion search
insight: Scrub a time range by where/when motion happened (motion search), part of Frigate's review subsystem.

title: Support onvif PasswordText cameras in the add camera wizard
insight: Some ONVIF cameras need PasswordText (vs PasswordDigest) WS-Security auth.
action: Support both PasswordText and PasswordDigest ONVIF auth.

title: Allow rtsps:// in camera wizard URL validation
insight: Accept rtsps:// (RTSP over TLS) in camera URL validation.
nurby_evidence: Nurby had NO stream-URL scheme validation -> also a file:// / SSRF surface.
action: DONE: added stream-type-aware scheme allowlist (shared/schemas.py validate_stream_url) accepting rtsps:// and rejecting file:///gopher:// etc. + tests.

title: Clone camera settings
insight: Duplicate an existing camera's config to a new camera to speed multi-camera setup.
action: Add 'clone camera' (copy config sans stream_url/credentials) endpoint + UI button.

title: Restore runtime state on startup
insight: Persist runtime toggles across restarts (overlay on YAML).
nurby_evidence: Nurby config is DB-driven; toggles already persist. Frigate needed this only due to YAML provisioning.

title: Add script to investigate accuracy of classification training set
feat: add Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant) language option
Add ability to control chapters set on MP4 Export
note: MP4 chapter markers on export; minor.

title: Add motion review docs
note: Signals Frigate's 'motion review' feature; captured in initiative.

title: Profiles fixes
note: Config profiles tied to YAML provisioning model.
